entities.name: ICGV-SM 83005
entities.description: An improved Spanish peanut germplasm developed at the ICRISAT Asia Center

entities.name: SPANISH PEANUT
entities.description: A variety of peanut identified as Arachis hypogaea L. subsp.fastigiata var. vulgaris

entities.name: ARACHIS HYPOGAEA
entities.description: The scientific name for the peanut plant

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the institution that developed the germplasm

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location of the ICRISAT Asia Center in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT Asia Center is located

entities.name: SADC/ICRISAT GROUNDNUT PROJECT
entities.description: A project in Malawi where ICGV-SM 83005 was first tested as an advanced breeding line

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where initial evaluations and the SADC/ICRISAT Groundnut Project were conducted

entities.name: SADC REGIONAL PEANUT YIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Regional trials used to evaluate the yield of peanut germplasm

entities.name: ICGMS 5
entities.description: An earlier designation for the germplasm ICGV-SM 83005

entities.name: CHIPEGO
entities.description: The name under which ICGV-SM 83005 was released in Zambia

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: The country where ICGV-SM 83005 was released as Chipego

entities.name: LOW- AND MEDIUM-RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental rainfall conditions to which the variety Chipego is particularly well adapted

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICAN REGION
